name: Convergence
description: Forces arrive in waves from all directions to seize contested ground. Timing and positioning are the only path to victory.

scoringRules.description: +1 VP per Focal Node controlled at End of Turn
+1 VP to first Side to Wound an Opposing model

specialRules.name: Reinforcements
specialRules.description: At Start of each Turn, each Side rolls Reinforcement dice. Each die showing 4+ deploys one Reinforcement Group within 6 MU of Entry Edge

specialRules.name: Entry Edges
specialRules.description: Divide battlefield perimeter into equal Entry Edges (one per Side)

_balance.notes: Favors aggressive play and reinforcement timing
